name: @longsightgroup/oneroster
description: Faithful OneRoster 1.2 for TypeScript — CSV and portable REST contracts, consumers, and provider helpers.

scripts.check: pnpm run format:check && pnpm run lint && pnpm run typecheck && pnpm run test
scripts.prepublishOnly: pnpm run check && pnpm run test:portability && pnpm run build
scripts.rest:spec-check: node tools/generate-v1p1-operation.mjs --refresh --check && pnpm run generate:v1p2-operation && pnpm run build && node tools/check-v1p2-openapi.mjs
scripts.test:portability: pnpm run build && pnpm exec vitest run test/v1p1-portability.test.ts test/v1p2-portability.test.ts && node tools/run-v1p1-portability.mjs && deno run --allow-read tools/run-v1p1-portability.mjs && node tools/run-v1p2-portability.mjs && deno run --allow-read tools/run-v1p2-portability.mjs
